name: proposeFileRenames
description: Analyzes a list of Google Drive files and returns a structured list of suggested new names along with the necessary Apps Script CardService UI code for user approval.

fileList.description: The list of files currently selected or found in the folder.

fileId.description: The unique Google Drive ID of the file.

namingConvention.description: Optional user preference for naming (e.g., 'Professional', 'ISO Date format', 'Short').
